heading: Short title
label: 80a–51 Short title
text: This subchapter may be cited as the “Investment Company Act of 1940”.
notes: Short Title of 2018 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 115–141, div. S, title VIII, § 801132 Stat. 1138Mar. 23, 2018“This title [amending sections 80a–56, 80a–60, 80a–62, and 80b–5 of this title and enacting provisions set out as a note under under ] may be cited as the ‘Small Business Credit Availability Act’.”section 80a–53 of this title

Short Title of 1996 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 104–290, title II, § 201110 Stat. 3426Oct. 11, 1996“This title [amending sections 80a–2, 80a–3, 80a–12, 80a–24, 80a–26, 80a–27, 80a–29, 80a–30, 80a–34, and 80b–5 of this title and enacting provisions set out as notes under sections 80a–2, 80a–3, and 80a–24 of this title] may be cited as the ‘Investment Company Act Amendments of 1996’.”

Short Title of 1995 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 104–62, § 1(a)109 Stat. 682Dec. 8, 1995“This Act [enacting , amending sections 77c, 78c, 78, 80a–3, 80a–7, and 80b–3 of this title, and enacting provisions set out as a note under ] may be cited as the ‘Philanthropy Protection Act of 1995’.”section 80a–3a of this titlesection 77c of this titlel

Short Title of 1980 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 96–477, § 194 Stat. 2275Oct. 21, 1980“That this Act [enacting sections 80a–53 to 80a–64 and 80c to 80c–3 of this title, amending sections 77b, 77c, 77d, 77s, 77ddd, 78c, 78kk, 80a–2, 80a–3, 80a–6, 80a–46, 80b–2, 80b–3, and 80b–5 of this title, and enacting provisions set out as notes under sections 77a and 80c of this title] may be cited as the ‘Small Business Investment Incentive Act of 1980’.”

Short Title of 1970 Amendment, , , provided:Pub. L. 91–547, § 184 Stat. 1413Dec. 14, 1970“That this Act [enacting , amending sections 77b, 77c, 78c, 78, 80a–2, 80a–3, 80a–8 to 80a–13, 80a–15, 80a–17 to 80a–19, 80a–22, 80a–24 to 80a–28, 80a–31, 80a–32, 80a–35, 80a–42, 80a–43, 80b–2, 80b–3, and 80b–5 of this title, and enacting provisions set out as notes under sections 77c and 80a–2 of this title] may be cited as the ‘Investment Company amendments Act of 1970’.”section 80b–6a of this titlel
